title: Sanmar Herald audio: 'You gave me clearance to go. You are firing now. Let me turn back'
snippet: Released audio reveals crew of the Sanmar Herald pleading with Iranian forces: 'You gave me clearance to go. My name is second on your list. You are firing now. Let me turn back.' Ship was carrying ~2 million barrels of Iraqi crude to India.
tag_reason: Audio release is significant new evidence for the Apr 18 Sanmar Herald attack — reveals crew had clearance before being fired upon
